---
title: Let Me Introduce Myself
author: "Daniel P. Riggins"
date: '2020-06-29'
slug: let-me-introduce-myself
categories: []
tags: [intro]
---

Hi, I'm Dan. I'm a pediatric resident with the IU School of Medicine in Indianapolis, which means I spend most of my time at the awesome [Riley Hospital for Children](https://www.instagram.com/rileychildrens/). I spent my last month in our intensive care unit, which was a humbling experience in a few different ways. First of all in terms of how much medicine I still have to learn after 6+ years of education/training. Also, in terms of the awesome power we healthcare providers have to sustain our patients' lives. But finally, how limited we still are to alter the overall life course of most children.
